description: Admin login for MVP. Parent registration/login is Phase 2. MVP parent flows use link-based access with email verification.

requirements.description: Admin can log in with email and password
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Valid credentials redirect to admin dashboard; invalid credentials show error message; session persists across page reloads

requirements.description: Admin can log out from any page
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Logout button is accessible from the sidebar; clicking it clears the session and redirects to login page

requirements.description: Admin can reset password via email
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Forgot password link sends a reset email; reset link expires after 24 hours

screens.description: Future parent portal login — stubbed in MVP architecture but not built

features.description: Parent registration and login for accessing enrollment history and profile

requirements.description: Parents can register with email and password and log in to view their enrollment history
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Phase 2: Registration creates a parent account; login shows past and current enrollments for all children

business_rules.rule: All admin routes require authentication; unauthenticated access redirects to login
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Accessing any admin URL without a valid session redirects to the admin login page

business_rules.rule: Parent-facing pages (program discovery, trial booking, enrollment) are publicly accessible in MVP without login
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Parent-facing URLs load without authentication; no login prompt is shown
